attributes.action: Reform Bereavement Payments to support children of divorced parents
attributes.additional_details: We propose a separate, automatic payment for surviving children to ensure they receive the financial security they deserve following the loss of a parent, independent of the surviving spouse's status.
attributes.background: I petition the government to update the Bereavement Support Payment criteria. The current system fails children whose parents are divorced, as the benefit is tied to the spouse.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757803
